blogs.name: A Sound Effect Blog
blogs.title: Featured Sound Creator: Mindful Audio | A Sound Effect
blogs.content: Why Mindful Audio stands out: George Vlad has been recording pristine and immersive nature soundscapes for more than a decade. In 2015 he launched Mindful Audio so he could share his ever-increasing collection of recordings with audio professionals. He draws on his experience living and working in unforgiving conditions where he captures sounds that very few people have access to. His quest to record and preserve these soundscapes has taken him to places like the Amazon, Congo and Borneo rainforests, Iceland, West Africa, the East African savanna, the Southern African bush, the Ethiopian highlands, an active volcano, the hottest and most lifeless place on earth, and many others. Mindful Audio libraries come with extensive species lists and cover these beautiful environments in exquisite detail. Beyond nature and wildlife, Mindful Audio offers vehicle, aircraft and sound design elements libraries. Explore Mindful Audio Click below to jump straight to your chosen topic: Highlighted Collection • Explore the catalog • More about Mindful Audio • What others are saying • Special licensing opportunities Highlight: Amazon Jungle Amazon Jungle is a collection of unique ambiences recorded in the Amazon rainforest on the border between Peru, Bolivia and Brazil. The library was recorded during the rainy season when birds are vocal and humidity is at its highest. These recordings feature species such as the Screaming Piha, Toucans, Howler Monkeys, Trogons, Tinamous, Owls, very vocal Bamboo Rats and a multitude of insects and frogs. the full Mindful Audio catalog here ↑ back to top What others are saying about Mindful Audio: The primordial sounds captured by George Vlad in this library are a treasure trove of high quality otherworldly atmospheric ambiances which evoke powerful, raw emotions you’d be hard pressed to find in any other commercially available library. The applications are numerous, from the obvious barren twisted landscape of otherworldly planets, to the depths of hell, to starship bellows or chemical labs of evil masterminds, to subtle layering in otherwise common scenarios or for use in spellcraft or magic sound effects, these sounds will add an unique quality. The risks and costs of such an expedition cannot be understated and I’m very much grateful this library exists! – Florian Ardelean – on the Volcano library I have never been to Senegal, but if ever do get there I will be disappointed if it doesn’t sound like George’s recordings. Deep and rich choruses, with insects that stack like the instruments of an orchestra, George’s recordings never fail to impress or educate me. – Andy Martin – on the African Wild West library George Vlad’s reputation for recording pristine, unique and immersive ambiences is well known in the industry. Focusing on this particular library, one can only imagine the dedication, efforts and time spent in order to record such detailed Amazon soundscapes. You get various locations ranging from the forest floor all the way to some beautiful riversides. Each location is divided into several key moments of the day and night , giving you the complete sound DNA of a particular place. Amazing Library all the way. Keep on traveling the world George! – Tibo Csuko, on the Amazon Jungle library ↑ back to top More about Mindful Audio: Preparing for a successful field recording trip Make the most of your field recording trip with these excellent planning tips from recordist George Vlad: Read the story here The Senegal sound recording expedition – with George Vlad: Sound recordist George Vlad shares the stories behind an incredible recording expedition to Senegal: Read the story here Capturing the fascinating sounds of Africa George Vlad and Daan Hendriks tell the intriguing stories behind their many African recording adventures: Read the story here How To Find The Best Handheld Recorder A good handheld recorder is an essential addition to any audio professional’s toolkit – but finding the right one is tricky. Get a much-needed overview here: Read the story here Capturing Atmospheric Nature Sounds in Scotland Get the story behind Woodland Atmosphere, a new SFX library that captures the atmospheric sounds of Scotland’s nature: Read the story here ↑ back to top Special business/enterprise licensing, bundles or subscriptions: Looking for custom bundles, subscriptions, custom licensing terms, or license management for Mindful Audio libraries?
